message:
fix(compile): Enable batch compilation for external package imports

- Add package_modules.txt manifest for tracking compiled packages (numpy, pytest)
- Register external packages as Zig modules in batch_build.zig
- Use module names instead of absolute paths for site-packages imports
- Add package modules to individual compilation fallback in compiler.zig
- Add missing __future__ feature flags required by pytest

Fixes "import of file outside module path" error in batch mode.
Now 8/11 numpy tests pass via batch compilation.
